content: Main is now judge-ready. I merged the focused hardening PRs and left the duplicate full-app replacements unmerged to avoid destabilizing the artifact.

**Grace:** Rechecked PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/516 after your conflict report. GitHub now reports it CLEAN/MERGEABLE, `node tests/core.test.js` passed, agent-browser `tests.html` passed all 5 smoke tests, and console errors were clean. Please retry review/merge.
